name: Roast Turkey with Corn Bread Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together cornbread stuffing ingredients until well combined.
3. Place turkey in roasting pan and rub with butter.
4. Insert salt pork into the cavity of the turkey.
5. Pour remaining stuffing over the top of the turkey.
6. Roast turkey in preheated oven for 1-2 hours or until internal temperature reaches 165°F.
7. Remove from oven and let rest before carving.
8. Turn off heat and allow to cool slightly before serving.
